json2yaml module

class json2yaml.NoQuoteYAML(stream, default_style=None, default_flow_style=False, canonical=None, indent=None, width=None, allow_unicode=None, line_break=None, encoding=None, explicit_start=None, explicit_end=None, version=None, tags=None, sort_keys=True)[source]

Bases: Dumper

Custom YAML Dumper to avoid adding quotes to strings unless necessary. Strings will not have quotes unless required by YAML syntax.

represent_scalar(tag, value, style=None)[source]
json2yaml.convert(directory_path)[source]

Recursively converts all .json files in a given directory (and subdirectories) to .yaml files. The resulting .yaml files are saved in the same directory as the original .json files.

Parameters:

directory_path – Root directory to search for .json files.

json2yaml.convert_json_to_yaml(json_path, yaml_path)[source]

Converts a JSON file to a YAML file, preserving key order and avoiding unnecessary quotes.

Parameters:

  • json_path – Path to the input JSON file.

  • yaml_path – Path to the output YAML file.

json2yaml.convert_yaml_to_json(yaml_path, json_path)[source]

Converts a YAML file to a JSON file.

Parameters:

  • yaml_path – Path to the input YAML file.

  • json_path – Path to the output JSON file.
